articles.title: Big Solana Wallet Now Top Utility App on Apple Store Amid Bull Frenzy
articles.description: Solana wallet Phantom now ranks third among utility apps on the Apple Store in the U.S. The Phantom Wallet team recently celebrated attaining 7 million monthly active users. Phantom’s top ranking coincides with the frenzy around Solana tokens WIF and BONK garnering billion-dollar valuations. articles.title: Tether Plans P2P Financial Market Platform
articles.description: Tether, the issuer of the USDT stablecoin, plans to develop a peer-to-peer financial markets terminal leveraging Holepunch technology. CEO Paolo Ardoino announced on X that Tether will invest substantial resources into this initiative. articles.title: Polkadot Creator Gavin Wood Says One Blockchain Use Case Crucial for Mass Adoption
articles.description: The creator of interoperability blockchain Polkadot (DOT) says that one use case for the blockchains is crucial for their mass adoption.
